bank.retain_mission: Extract pipeline metrics, forecast accuracy, sales-engineering technical patterns, and process-improvement outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about pipeline coverage, conversion rates by stage, common technical objections, and SE workflow conventions. Ignore daily metric blips.

mental_models.name: Pipeline Health
mental_models.source_query: What does pipeline coverage and stage conversion look like, and where do deals consistently slip?

mental_models.name: SE Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What technical objections and integration questions recur, and how do we resolve them?
